title: Frycook's Delight
description: Add fried foods to the menu in a Farmer's Delight style.
body:
Frycook's Delight adds canola flowers to plains biomes, allowing you to make cooking oil and deep fry a variety of vanilla and Farmer's Delight foods.

# How to play

To craft canola oil, place 3 seeds in the Farmer's Delight cooking pot and include a heat source and a glass bottle.

![JEI view of the canola oil recipe in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b77f411cb23d072ff55d675ad15276fd9b3c0b99.png)

Fill an ordinary cauldron with 3 bottles of oil, provide a heat source, and then toss items into the bubbling oil. Valid recipes will result in fried foods, and invalid ones will be destroyed, or will return a burnt morsel.

As you use the cooking oil, it will steadily get older and dirtier and need to be replaced. At the final stage, it becomes a new fluid: hot grease. Food thrown into hot grease will always be destroyed or produce a burnt morsel. It can be removed from the cauldron in a bucket.

![Three cauldrons of oil at different stages of freshness.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/991a25275a249c6ccb42590c7dd3b5ef975a37c2.png)

Remove the heat source and leave hot grease in the cauldron to cool and it will solidify into a block of lard. Right click to remove.

![A cauldron full of solid lard.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d24e46e7f5834524cdf5fc664093895154c2058.png)

There are additional interactions to discover, make sure to try things out!

# Credits

Code by [Uraneptus](https://x.com/uraneptus2) | Art by [ArBeet!](https://x.com/ArBeeeet) | Concept by [Somfunambulist](https://x.com/witch_warren)
